scripts.bootstrap: npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix services/service-a && npm install --prefix services/service-b
scripts.test: npm test --prefix gateway && npm test --prefix services/service-a && npm test --prefix services/service-b
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix gateway && npm run lint --prefix services/service-a && npm run lint --prefix services/service-b
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test
